posts.angle: wallet and checkout improvements raise user expectations for payment speed
posts.copy:
Payment rails keep improving.

Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way. Teams move faster when payment setup does not slow subscriptions, ads, or cross-border checkout.

RichXPay supports use case page for binding a virtual card to apple pay and using it in wallet-led payment flows.
sourceTitles: Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way.
We’re adding 3 new ways to make web payments easier and more flexible.
posts.landingSummary: Use case page for binding a virtual card to Apple Pay and using it in wallet-led payment flows.
